languages.text: {n}Но в одном вы твердо уверены: миг, в который вас отбросило к исходной точке, в точности совпал с тем мгновением, когда ваш достопочтенный предок, Себериан фон Валанциус, испустил дух.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Но в одном вы твердо уверены: миг, в который вас отбросило к исходной точке, в точности совпал с тем мгновением, когда ваш достопочтенный предок, Себериан фон Валанциус, испустил дух.{/n}

languages.text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Но в одном вы твердо уверены: миг, в который вас отбросило к исходной точке, в точности совпал с тем мгновением, когда ваш достопочтенный предок, Себериан фон Валанциус, испустил дух.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}
{n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}
{n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aber in einem Punkt bist du dir sicher. Du wurdest in exakt dem Moment an deinen Ausgangspunkt zurückversetzt, in dem dein geschätzter Ahnherr, Seberian von Valancius, sein Leben aushauchte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aber in einem Punkt bist du dir sicher. Du wurdest in exakt dem Moment an deinen Ausgangspunkt zurückversetzt, in dem dein geschätzter Ahnherr, Seberian von Valancius, sein Leben aushauchte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}但有一点你无比确定：就在你那位显赫的先祖塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯咽下最后一口气的瞬间，你被重新抛回了起点。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}但有一点你无比确定：就在你那位显赫的先祖塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯咽下最后一口气的瞬间，你被重新抛回了起点。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cependant, une chose demeure certaine : vous vous retrouvez au point de départ, au moment précis où votre honorable aïeul, Seberian von Valancius, a rendu son dernier soupir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cependant, une chose demeure certaine : vous vous retrouvez au point de départ, au moment précis où votre honorable aïeul, Seberian von Valancius, a rendu son dernier soupir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pero una cosa está clara: retrocediste de nuevo al preciso instante en que tu ilustre antepasado Seberian von Valancius exhalaba su último suspiro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pero una cosa está clara: retrocediste de nuevo al preciso instante en que tu ilustre antepasado Seberian von Valancius exhalaba su último suspiro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ancak bir şeyden eminsin: Seçkin atan Seberian von Valancius son nefesini verdiği anda başlangıç noktana geri fırlatılıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ancak bir şeyden eminsin: Seçkin atan Seberian von Valancius son nefesini verdiği anda başlangıç noktana geri fırlatılıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}しかし、一つだけは確かなことだ。貴方の祖先であるシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスが息を引き取った瞬間、貴方は元の場所に戻されたのだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}But of one thing you are certain: you were thrown back to your starting point at the precise moment that your distinguished ancestor, Seberian von Valancius, breathed his last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}しかし、一つだけは確かなことだ。貴方の祖先であるシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスが息を引き取った瞬間、貴方は元の場所に戻されたのだ。{/n}
